TextView.android:text: Upon checking the \'Reject\' checkbox, you as the seed inspector acknowledges that the selected seedtag (200 bags) will not be accepted and received on any other delivery.\n\n However, if partial rejection is needed, you can still accept the specified volume of seeds in the seedlot - for example 150 out of 200 bags were still accepted from the delivery and remarks should be provided why some of the bags have been rejected.
